sections.name: Officium
lines: Quinta die infra Octavam Ss. Apostolorum Petri et Pauli

sections.name: Comment
lines: In Divino Afflatu, when the next day is impeded by the Octave of SSmi Cordis (e.g. 2025) or a Sunday, the proper last gospel from the Octave of the Apostels is said on this day.

sections.name: Evangelium
sections.condition: rubrica divino et feria 7 aut rubrica divino et feria 5 et tempore Octava SSmi Cordis
